instructions: For each image in `images`, read the file via the Read tool and write a sibling JSON file (same name, .json extension) with the schema: {classification, arabic_text, urdu_text, english_text, suggested_citation: {surah, ayat} | null, alt_text, confidence, notes}. classification ∈ {quran-verse, hadith, poem-or-saying, teaching-diagram, mixed, other}. For quran-verse, propose surah+ayat from your reading; finalize.py validates against HQAyats. For teaching-diagram, give a 1-2 sentence alt_text describing what it shows.
